message:
✨ Fix benchmark workflow registry and add rich widget previews (#965)

- Fix Benchmarking "no runs" by pointing to correct repo (llm-d/llm-d-benchmark)
  and workflow filenames (ci-nighly-benchmark-ocp.yaml, ci-nighly-benchmark-gke.yaml)
- Add CKS benchmark entry (nightly-e2e-benchmarking-cks.yaml)
- Replace generic widget export previews with card-type-specific mock data previews
  for all 20+ card types (cluster health, GPU, pods, security, alerts, etc.)
- Improve stat block and template previews with realistic sample numbers

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
